message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam ParticipantPadding 40
skinparam BoxPadding 10

actor Admin

participant ":RemoveScooterUI" as UI
participant ":RemoveScooterScooterController" as CTRL
participant "pharmServ\n:PharmacyService" as PS
database "pharmDB\n:PharmacyDB" as PDB
participant "scootServ\n:ScooterService" as SS
database "scootDB\n:ScooterDB" as SDB

Admin -> UI : 1 Sends a request regarding the update of an electric scooter's data
activate UI

UI -> CTRL : 2 showPharmacies()
activate CTRL

CTRL -> PS : 3 create()
activate PS

PS -> PDB : 4 create()
activate PDB
deactivate PDB

CTRL -> PS : 5 lstPharmacies = getPharmacies()
PS -> PDB : 6 lstPharmacies = getPharmacies()
activate PDB
ref over PDB
  SD_CONNECTIONS
end ref
deactivate PDB

deactivate PS
deactivate CTRL

UI -> Admin : 7 Shows the list of pharmacies and asks to choose one
Admin -> UI : 8 Chooses the pharmacy

UI -> CTRL : 9 showScooterList(pharmacyId)
activate CTRL

CTRL -> SS : 10 create()
activate SS

SS -> SDB : 11 create()
activate SDB
deactivate SDB

CTRL -> SS : 12 lstScooters = getScootersList(pharmacyId)
SS -> SDB : 13 lstScooters = getScootersList(pharmacyId)
activate SDB
ref over SDB
  SD_CONNECTIONS
end ref
deactivate SDB

deactivate SS
deactivate CTRL

UI -> Admin : 14 Shows the list of eletric scooters and asks to choose one
Admin -> UI : 15 Chooses the eletric scooter
UI -> Admin : 16 Shows the information about the scooter, asking to update
Admin -> UI : 17 Updates the information

UI -> CTRL : 18 updateScooter(batteryPerc, chargingStatus,\npotency, weight, batteryCapacity, maxPayload, pharmacyId)
activate CTRL

CTRL -> SS : 19 updateScooter(batteryPerc, chargingStatus,\npotency, weight, batteryCapacity, maxPayload, pharmacyId)
activate SS

SS -> SDB : 20 updateScooterFromDB(batteryPerc, chargingStatus,\npotency, weight, batteryCapacity, maxPayload, pharmacyId)
activate SDB
ref over SDB
  SD_Connections
end ref
deactivate SDB

deactivate SS
deactivate CTRL

UI -> Admin : 21 Validates all the information, informing of the success of the operation
deactivate UI

@enduml
```
